positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and intricate monochromatic linework illustration of a 'Cosmic Bloom.' The central subject is a stylized, symmetrical lotus flower interwoven with geometric celestial elements, including delicate crescent moons, abstract constellations, and flowing, organic nebula patterns. The style must be a sophisticated blend of modern dot-work (stippling) and elegant etching art, emphasizing strong black silhouettes and clean negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered, isolated on a pure white background, and designed for maximum contrast and visibility when printed on apparel. Clean lines are critical.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, blurry, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, amateur sketch, photo, color gradient, cartoon, illegible text
